def test_fetch_broadcast_status():
        run_id = generate_run_id()
        env = os.environ.copy()
        env["ZEALT_RUN_ID"] = run_id
    
        # Run the script
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["node", "index.js"],
            cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
            env=env,
            capture_output=True,
            text=True
        )
    
        assert result.returncode == 0, f"Script failed with error: {result.stderr}"
    
        stdout = result.stdout
    
        # Extract Broadcast ID
        id_match = re.search(r"Broadcast ID:\s*([a-zA-Z0-9\-]+)", stdout)
        assert id_match, f"Could not find 'Broadcast ID: <id>' in output: {stdout}"
        broadcast_id = id_match.group(1)
    
        # Extract Status
        status_match = re.search(r"Status:\s*([a-zA-Z]+)", stdout)
>       assert status_match, f"Could not find 'Status: <status>' in output: {stdout}"
